deck: [Envenom+, Infinite Blades, Blade Dance+, Finisher+, Backflip+, Crippling Cloud, Panache, Well-Laid Plans+, Noxious Fumes, Deadly Poison, Cloak and Dagger+, Neutralize+, Slice, 4x Defend+, 2x Strike+, Survivor, Escape Plan+]
relics: [Ring of the Snake, Kunai, Cursed Key, Lantern]
cause_of_death: Infrastructure failure — CommunicationMod stdin/stdout pipe froze mid-combat against The Collector (Act 2 boss). Not a gameplay death.
key_moments: Built strong Envenom+ / Shiv / Infinite Blades poison engine
Had 8 Dexterity from Kunai scaling during Collector fight
The Collector was at 165/282 HP with 18 poison stacked when communication froze
Relay could read cached state but could not send commands — game process alive but mod deadlocked
lessons: No gameplay lessons — this was an infrastructure failure, not a strategic mistake
CommunicationMod has no "continue" command to resume saved games, making mid-run recovery impossible
The deck and strategy were strong — Envenom + Shivs + Kunai is an effective Silent archetype
